description: CompositionKnee length black yoga shorts made of 100% cotton, has an elasticated waistband, a sash on the outside and embroidered brand name on the left sideFitRegularWash careHand or machine wash cold with a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDry in shadeDo not bleachWarm ironThese yoga shorts from urban yoga have a breathable fabric, and a soft waistband. Team it up with a cool T-shirt and a comfortable pair of shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26"
